name: CONTRACT-BUG-42
title: test-bug-fixes-cycle BACKLOG-8 pins deleted rabbit-cage hook paths
description: test-bug-fixes-cycle.py lines 167-172 hardcode RABBIT_PRINT_PRODUCERS = [.claude/features/rabbit-cage/hooks/sync-check.py, session-init.py, refresh.py, .claude/features/tdd-state-machine/scripts/tdd-step.py]. Plan C (meta-contract dispatcher rewrite) replaced those three rabbit-cage hooks with stop-dispatcher.py / session-start-dispatcher.py / user-prompt-submit-dispatcher.py. The test now fails: 'BACKLOG-8: declared producers missing on disk'. Fix: either (a) update the list to reference the new dispatcher hooks; or (b) drop the rabbit-cage entries entirely, since the new dispatchers consume rabbit_subline + rabbit_block via runtime API print_result returns, not the named-wrapper convention this test was guarding. Filed as alongside finding from Plan C wave (see docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-23-housekeeping-protocol.md).

history.note: Fixed in CONTRACT-WAVE-9: test-bug-fixes-cycle.py BACKLOG-8 stub replaced with active assertion against the surviving named-wrapper producer set (tdd-step.py + dispatch-tdd-subagent.py per new Inv 29 wording). Plan-C-deleted rabbit-cage hooks no longer referenced.
